archimate:Grouping.name: Trust Enablers
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Trust Enablers ABB is a Grouping that refers to components and services that facilitate the establishment and maintenance of secure-cross borders transactions and interactions.
Source: Inspired in eIDAS
Source reference: http://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=uriserv%3AOJ.L_.2014.257.01.0073.01.ENG
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - application
Interoperability Saliency: The Trust Enablers Grouping is salient for interoperability because it comprises the set of tools, services and applications that allow to secure the digital public services across borders. Trust enablers are focused on transactions and interactions between parties (services, platforms, individuals) related to services. By applying those mechanisms identities, and timestamps (amongst other aspects) can be guaranteed and ensure the trustworthy data exchange
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TrustEnablersGrouping
ABB name: eira:TrustEnablersGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TrustEnablersGrouping
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication

properties.value: Trust Enablers ABB is a Grouping that refers to components and services that facilitate the establishment and maintenance of secure-cross borders transactions and interactions.

The Trust Enablers Grouping is salient for interoperability because it comprises the set of tools, services and applications that allow to secure the digital public services across borders. Trust enablers are focused on transactions and interactions between parties (services, platforms, individuals) related to services. By applying those mechanisms identities, and timestamps (amongst other aspects) can be guaranteed and ensure the trustworthy data exchange
